options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: goal_condition
options.description:
Choose what you need to do to win.
Defeat Bowser Monsters: Unlock a full team and the day-night cycle, then defeat the Bowser Monsters in a game.
Play Badge: Unlock and win all minigames (including Toy Field).
Friend Badge: Recruit all characters.
Star Badge: Have star status on every character, then defeat the Bowser Monsters in a game.

options.name: goal_characters
options.description: How many characters you need to have unlocked in order to fight Bowser Jr. and Bowser.

options.name: starting_captain
options.description: Choose which captain you want to start with.

options.name: randomize_shops
options.description:
Choose whether shop items are randomized. Logical access to at least one minigame is expected in order to shop.
Full: All shop items are randomized.
Key Items Only: Luigi's Flashlight and the Cruiser Pass are randomized, all other shop items are unchanged.
None: All shop items are in their vanilla locations.

options.name: randomize_stars
options.description: Adds a check for achieving star status with each character and randomizes the stars into the pool.

options.name: randomize_music
options.description: Shuffles music between different stadiums, overworld locations, and menus.

options.name: reduced_cutscenes
options.description: Marks certain one-time cutscenes as already watched to speed up gameplay.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: start_inventory_from_pool
options.description:
Start with the specified amount of these items and don't place them in the world. Example: "Bomb: 1"

The game decides what the replacement items will be.
